Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. On February 12, 2023, the 2023 Berlin repeat state election was held to elect the 19th Abgeordnetenhaus of Berlin, which had been elected on 26 September 2021. On November 16, 2022, the Constitutional Court of the State of Berlin declared the results of the Abgeordnetenhaus election invalid due to numerous irregularities and ordered a repeat election within 90 days. The coalition of the Social Democratic Party (SPD), The Greens, and The Left led by Governing Mayor Franziska Giffey was voted out of office.
B. On February 12, 2023, the Berlin repeat state election took place, serving as a re-election for the 19th Abgeordnetenhaus of Berlin. This legislative body had initially been chosen on September 26, 2021. However, on November 16, 2022, the Constitutional Court of the State of Berlin invalidated the prior election's outcomes, citing widespread irregularities, and mandated a new election to be conducted within 90 days. While five constitutional complaints are still awaiting a ruling from the Federal Constitutional Court, this decision is not expected until subsequent to the repeat election. At the time, the government in power was a coalition comprising the Social Democratic Party (SPD), The Greens, and The Left, with Governing Mayor Franziska Giffey at its helm. In addition to the Abgeordnetenhaus election, the results for the borough councils were also deemed invalid, necessitating repeat elections for these bodies on the identical date. With 28% of
C. The 2023 Berlin repeat state election was held on 12 February 2023 to once again elect the 19th Abgeordnetenhaus of Berlin. The 19th Abgeordnetenhaus was originally elected on 26 September 2021. On 16 November 2022, the Constitutional Court of the State of Berlin declared the results invalid due to numerous irregularities and ordered a repeat election within 90 days. A decision by the Federal Constitutional Court regarding five constitutional complaints is still pending, but will not be decided until after the repeat election. The incumbent government was a coalition of the Social Democratic Party (SPD), The Greens, and The Left led by Governing Mayor Franziska Giffey.
